CAD market value ($/SF)	$219.23	$209.01	$227.85	$247.10	$219.95	$204.16
ADJUSTMENTS

DERIVATION
CAD market value		$1,083,500	$1,201,223	$1,301,230	$1,205,300	$1,060,425
Total net adjustments		−$2,616	+$9,910	+$24,922	−$108,298	+$27,353

% difference from comp CAD market value		-0.2%	+0.8%	+1.9%	-9.0%	+2.6%
INDICATOR (BASED ON SUBJECT SF)

Median adjusted value of comps	$1,097,002
Median adjusted value ($/SF — based on Subject SF)	$205.51
4. Analysis

For each of the 5 comparables in Section 3, the CAD's noticed market value is adjusted for size, age/condition, land value, and additional features (pools, garages, misc.) to produce an indicated value for the subject. The median of those 5 indicated values is the requested ask.

Median adjusted property value (5 comparables): $1,097,002
Implied $/SF on subject footprint: $206/sqft
Subject's living area: 5,338 sqft
Subject's current notice: $1,170,244
Difference: $73,242 (6.26% above the comparable median)
5. Adjustment Methodology

Adjustments shown in Section 3 are based on analysis and interpretation of market factors as to how they impact the individual property values. Each comparable's CAD-noticed value is reviewed against the subject for size, age and condition, land, and other property-specific features, and a net adjustment is applied to bring the comparable onto equal footing with the subject before the requested value is derived.

Non-appraisal disclaimer: This report is not a USPAP-compliant appraisal and does not constitute a real estate appraisal as defined under the Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice. The analysis is prepared solely for the purpose of supporting a property tax protest filing under Texas Property Tax Code §41.43, using CAD-published data and the property owner's interpretation of market factors. The requested market value reflects the property owner's good-faith opinion of value; it does not represent a market-value opinion for any purpose other than this protest. (Placeholder text — pending Mike's final wording.)
